text_block_list.name: Teacher
text_block_list.text: ...And those are all the events and<n>positions for the Spring Fan Fest.<n>Have a look at the details and apply<n>for your top choices by the deadline!

text_block_list.name: Classmates
text_block_list.text: Okaaay!

text_block_list.name: Classmate A
text_block_list.text: I wanna go for an event that'll get me<n>tons of new fans! How about you?<n>Are you gonna enter that "race from<n>hell" everyone's talking about?

text_block_list.name: Classmate B
text_block_list.text: No way! I'm more interested in<n>applying for the Cheer Squad. But<n>then I wouldn't be able to compete in<n>the events... Hm...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...Cheer Squad, eh?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Heh. I know what I must do. The Fan<n>Fest is a day to behave as my fans<n>would want me to.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It will be the perfect stage for me to<n>give a grand performance and prove<n>my first-rate qualities!

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Ooh, I'm going to make use of my<n>intellect and enter the quiz run!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Ah, that's a good choice! You're<n>taking the opportunity to show off<n>your speed and your smarts!

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: I-I was thinking of entering the<n>marathon. I don't know if I'm much<n>of a marathon runner, but I want to<n>give it a try.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Great idea! As the name suggests,<n>the Fan Fest is like a festival, so it's<n>a good chance to explore something<n>new with no pressure!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I want to make my fans super happy!<n>Which event should I enter?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Oh, my! Hehe. Just look at the big<n>picture and you'll get your answer.<n>Your fans are people who have<n>chosen to support you over countless<n>other Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: So give them a moment that'll make<n>them glad they chose you. People like<n>to follow someone with a firm dream<n>and charisma.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ah! Waaah! You're the best, King!<n>That was so helpful!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I understand now! I'll choose an<n>event that lets me show off my<n>dreams and my charisma to the max!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Speaking of which, which event are<n>you going to enter?! I'd love to hear<n>your thought process!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Naturally, I'll choose an event that<n>allows me to express my charm to<n>the fullest. A challenge that'll make<n>the audience's palms sweat as I face<n>up to it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Though I must say, some of the<n>options seem a little daunting even for<n>me.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The scavenger hunt obstacle race is<n>known as the "race from hell." Due to<n>its intense difficulty, participants have<n>dwindled and so has its audience.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ohhhhh... "Daunting"... "Challenge"...<n>Which means everyone will be<n>smitten if you can complete it!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: A lot of runners give up halfway, so<n>to be able to entertain the fans and<n>show off your skills in this race is a<n>real test of aptitude.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: It's not the kind of event just anyone<n>can... Huh? Kawakami?

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: DAAAAAH!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I will... push... to the maaax!

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume A
text_block_list.text: What? Is Kawakami seriously taking<n>on the 4,000-meter scavenger hunt<n>obstacle race? The one everyone<n>drops out of every year?

text_block_list.name: Nearby Umamusume B
text_block_list.text: Even if she manages it, not many<n>people will be there to watch. And<n>hardly anyone's even entering this<n>year, right?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: That nincompoop!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Why did you choose that race?! You<n>should've listened to what I was<n>going to say!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Hey, Kawakami! We had a few<n>chocolate taiyaki left over from<n>dessert. There's three up for grabs,<n>so they're doing rock, paper,<n>scissors for them!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Really?! Let me pla... I mean, I'll pass!

text_block_list.name: Seeking the Pearl
text_block_list.text: Are you sure? You don't want them?<n>I thought they were your favorite.

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Ngh... I'm sure! I don't have a second<n>to spare right now!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Pant, pant... If I overcome thischallenge, I'll become a first-rateprincess!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I too... I too...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Will become first-rate like King! So I<n>can make my fans glad they chose to<n>support me!

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Wow, Kawakami's still practicing for<n>the Fan Fest. Well... makes sense<n>when her event is so hard to<n>complete.

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: She's doing all this practice late into<n>the night. It'd be sad if no one came<n>to cheer for her on the big day.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...That nincompoop.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: From what I hear, she's been turning<n>down her favorite things to spend all<n>her time on practice.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: She's even started copying me,<n>calling herself a first-rate princess.

text_block_list.name: Bob-Hair Umamusume
text_block_list.text: You know, King, it's tomorrow. The<n>deadline to hand in your choices for<n>the Fan Fest.

text_block_list.name: Cat-Eyed Umamusume
text_block_list.text: Which event are you entering?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: ...The Cheer Squad can't take part in<n>the competitions. I usually wouldn't<n>even consider it.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: But...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I am King Halo, now a member of the<n>Cheer Squad!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: The most appropriate position for me<n>is at the top, meaning I would like to<n>be the leader! To celebrate this<n>meeting, I have made costumes for all<n>of you!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Huh? Costumes? What? This is the<n>first time the Cheer Squad is meeting,<n>isn't it?

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Yes. But I give everything my<n>absolute best! Through my<n>connections, I got us a custom-made<n>design!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: This year, we have only one goal! To<n>maximize the fun at every event,<n>even those that don't usually receive<n>much attention.

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: Our cheers must be worthy of the<n>competitors giving their all. That's<n>why...

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: I will put together the most flashy and<n>unique plan that I possibly can!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Wh-whaaa?!

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (Since a certain fan of mine has<n>chosen such a difficult challenge...)

text_block_list.name: King Halo
text_block_list.text: (The least I can do is cheer her on.<n>After all, the Fan Fest is an event for<n>the fans, isn't it?)
